# FLTK Notice

- Upstream project: Fast Light Toolkit (FLTK)
- Upstream URL: https://github.com/fltk/fltk
- Bundled version: 1.4.4, identified by `FL_MAJOR_VERSION`,
  `FL_MINOR_VERSION`, and `FL_PATCH_VERSION` in the bundled headers
- Upstream tag: `release-1.4.4`
- License: FLTK License, consisting of the GNU Library General Public License
  version 2 with the FLTK exceptions; copied verbatim from the upstream tag in
  `LICENSE.txt`
- Bundled locations: `KswordSetup/fltk/include/`,
  `KswordSetup/fltk/Debug/`, and `KswordSetup/fltk/Release/`

The repository currently contains prebuilt FLTK libraries and tools but does
not record the exact upstream source commit or build recipe used to create each
binary. Before redistributing those binaries, provide the corresponding FLTK
source and any local FLTK modifications as required by the FLTK License.

Ksword application code outside the bundled FLTK materials is not offered
under the FLTK License merely because it links to FLTK. The FLTK static-linking
exception and the complete license text control that boundary.
